pi_items.source: Verified in task.json description (line 5): 'Change to exactly "SkyGuard Operations"', export_result.sh (line 38) searches for this string, and verifier.py (line 60) checks for this exact site_header value
Verified in task.json description (line 5): 'Change to exactly "SkyGuard Admin"', export_result.sh (line 43) searches for this string, and verifier.py (line 67) checks for this exact site_title value

Verified in task.json description (line 5): 'Change to exactly "Fleet Command Center"', export_result.sh (lines 49, 55) searches for this string, and verifier.py (line 74) checks for this exact index_title value

Verified in install_aerobridge.sh (line 160): 'Admin panel: http://localhost:8000/admin/', setup_task.sh (line 23) launches Firefox to 'http://localhost:8000/admin/login/', export_result.sh (lines 21, 31) uses this URL, and standard Django admin URL pattern

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task for customizing the Django admin interface branding in Aerobridge, an open-source drone fleet management system. The task requires modifying the application code to set three Django admin site attributes: site_header to 'SkyGuard Operations', site_title to 'SkyGuard Admin', and index_title to 'Fleet Command Center'. The admin interface is accessible at http://localhost:8000/admin/ using default credentials admin/adminpass123. The verification process checks the HTML response from the running Django server to confirm all three custom branding strings are present and visible in the admin interface.
